title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/12/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.49% today, the main contract closed 821. The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steelmills are wait and see.The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse. PBF at Shandong port dealt 820 yuan/mt,increase 7 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshanport dealt 847 yuan/mt,increase 7-17 yuan/mt.
